description: The Toa-kai is a yakuza syndicate based in Tokyo, Japan, founded in 1948 by Zainichi Korean mob boss Hisayuki Machii as the Tosei-kai. Originally a far-right anti-communist organization, it became one of Tokyo's most powerful gangs during post-war economic growth. The group is a member of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation and has aligned with the Yamaguchi-gumi. As of the infobox, it has an estimated 20 members.
